parameters.description: Send notifications to your own LINE destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise line:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a LINE Messaging API push-message body and post it to api.line.me (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"to":"${ customer_secrets.LINE_MSG_TARGETS }","messages":[{"type":"text","text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}]}
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment LINE destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to LINE Messaging API push message (no Apprise)

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's LINE targets

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's LINE token
